name: @nestjs-filter-grammar/e2e
description: End-to-end integration tests for all nestjs-filter-grammar adapters

scripts.prisma:setup: DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION=yes prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.prisma --force-reset --skip-generate
